hero.title: Your Journey to Mental Wellness Starts Here
hero.description: Professional support for anxiety, depression, and personal growth. Specialized care tailored to your needs.

services.title: Comprehensive Care
services.description: We offer a wide range of mental health services to support your emotional and psychological well-being.

individual.title: Individual Therapy
individual.desc: One-on-one sessions focused on personal growth and overcoming life's challenges.

couples.title: Couples Counseling
couples.desc: Strengthen your relationship and improve communication with expert guidance.

child.title: Child & Adolescent
child.desc: Specialized support for young minds navigating developmental and emotional hurdles.

teletherapy.title: Teletherapy
teletherapy.desc: Convenient online sessions from the comfort and privacy of your home.

group.title: Group Support
group.desc: Connect with others facing similar challenges in a safe, moderated environment.

addiction.title: Addiction Recovery
addiction.desc: Professional guidance and support for overcoming substance and behavioral dependencies.

professionals.title: Meet Our Mental Health Professionals
professionals.description: Our team of certified psychiatrists and psychologists are here to support your mental health journey.

practitioner.title: Apply as a Practitioner
practitioner.description: Are you a certified mental health professional? Join our network and help transform lives across Ethiopia.
practitioner.benefit1_desc: Set your own schedule and manage appointments with ease.
practitioner.benefit2_desc: Access advanced tools for better patient management.
practitioner.benefit3_desc: Join a community of the best mental health experts in the country.

form.title: Practitioner Application Form
form.message: Why do you want to join Hiwot?
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
form.success_desc: Thank you for your interest. Our clinical director will review your profile and contact you soon.

booking.title: Book Your Session
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll confirm your appointment shortly.
booking.success_desc: We have received your request and will contact you shortly.
booking.reason_placeholder: Tell us briefly how we can help

chatbot.name: Hiwot AI Assistant
chatbot.initial_msg: Hello! I'm Hiwot AI. How can I support your mental well-being today?

responses.anxiety: Anxiety can be tough. Try deep breathing: inhale for 4, hold for 4, exhale for 4. Would you like to speak with a professional?
responses.booking: You can book a session directly through our booking form on the website or call us at 952.
responses.professionals: We have a team of expert psychologists and psychiatrists. You can see their profiles in the 'Mental Health Professionals' section.
responses.emergency: If you're in immediate danger, please call our emergency line 952 or visit the nearest hospital.
responses.unknown: I'm here to listen. Could you please provide more details so I can help you better?

health_tips.sunlight: 15 mins of sunlight boosts your mood.
health_tips.sleep: Quality sleep is vital for mental clarity.

footer.description: Leading mental healthcare provider in Ethiopia, dedicated to your psychological well-being and growth.

insurance.title: Our Insurance Partners
insurance.description: We accept these and many other insurance types. Please call us to verify if your insurance is supported.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.saba_text: The support I received at this center completely changed my life. The professionals are very caring and dedicated.
testimonials.jonas_text: The video consultation sessions helped me follow my treatment without disrupting my work. Thank you very much!
testimonials.leyu_text: The group discussions made me realize that others have similar problems as me and made me not feel alone.

post1.title: Signs of Anxiety and Their Solutions
post1.excerpt: How can we reduce the impact of anxiety on our daily lives?

post2.title: The Importance of Deep Sleep for Mental Health
post2.excerpt: Learn how good sleep helps us have mental rest and focus.

post3.title: How to Stop Overthinking?
post3.excerpt: Thinking too much about one thought for a long time can be harmful to mental health.
